# Advizen Consulting

> Premier business advisory firm based in Tashkent, Uzbekistan, providing integrated consulting across tax, legal, finance, accounting, and HR for foreign investors and businesses operating in Central Asia.

Advizen Consulting is a full-service business consultancy serving foreign investors, multinationals, and local companies entering or operating in Uzbekistan and the broader Central Asian market. We combine seven advisory disciplines (tax, legal, finance, accounting, audit, HR, and compliance) with managed operations services under one roof, acting as a single point of contact for the entire lifecycle of a business in the region.

## Company

- Name: Advizen Consulting
- Location: Tashkent, Uzbekistan
- Geographic focus: Uzbekistan, Kazakhstan, Central Asia
- Languages: English, Russian (Русский), Uzbek (O'zbek)
- Website: https://www.advizenco.com

## Services

### Advisory Services
- Tax advisory and structuring (corporate profit tax, VAT, personal income tax, transfer pricing)
- Legal advisory (company registration, corporate governance, contracts, licensing)
- Financial advisory (investment structuring, M&A, financial modelling)
- Accounting and bookkeeping (IFRS, local GAAP, management accounts)
- Audit and assurance (statutory audit, internal audit, due diligence)
- HR consulting (payroll, employment contracts, Employer of Record / EOR)
- Compliance and regulatory affairs (AML, regulatory filings, NAPP licensing for crypto/fintech)

### Managed Operations
- Company registration and liquidation
- Accounting outsourcing
- Payroll and HR administration
- Employer of Record (EOR) services
- Special Economic Zone (SEZ / FEZ) structuring
- Permit and licence applications
- Corporate secretarial services

### Document Store
- Ready-made legal and corporate document templates (available in Russian and Uzbek)
- Shareholder agreements, employment contracts, NDA, service agreements
- Instant download; templates updated for current Uzbekistan legislation (12-month free update policy)

## Key Facts — Uzbekistan Business Environment

- Corporate profit tax rate: 15%
- VAT rate: 12%
- Personal income tax rate: 12% (flat)
- Social tax (employer): 12%
- LLC (MChJ) registration timeline: 1–3 business days via e-government portal
- Full operational readiness (bank account, tax registration): 1–3 weeks
- 100% foreign ownership permitted in the vast majority of sectors
- Law on Foreign Investment guarantees profit repatriation and protection against nationalisation
- Special Economic Zones (SEZs): Navoiy FEZ, Urgut FEZ, Jizzakh SEZ, and others — offer tax holidays up to 10 years
- Crypto/fintech licensing body: NAPP (National Agency for Perspective Projects)

## Insights — Articles & Guides

- [Islamic Finance in Uzbekistan: A Practical Guide](https://www.advizenco.com/insights/islamic-finance-uzbekistan) — Overview of Sharia-compliant instruments, CB Resolution No. 23/4, and MFO obligations (2026-04-28)
- [Special Economic Zones in Uzbekistan: A Comparative Guide](https://www.advizenco.com/insights/special-economic-zones-uzbekistan) — Tax holidays, FEZ/SEZ structures, eligibility and application (2026-04-15)
- [Employer of Record in Central Asia: A Practical Overview](https://www.advizenco.com/insights/employer-of-record-central-asia) — EOR across Uzbekistan, Kazakhstan, Kyrgyzstan — hire without a local entity (2026-03-15)
- [Outsourcing Operational Activities in Uzbekistan](https://www.advizenco.com/insights/outsourcing-operational-activities) — Regulatory framework, permitted structures, labour implications (2025-11-10)
- [Accounting Policy for Tax Purposes in Uzbekistan](https://www.advizenco.com/insights/accounting-policy-tax-purposes) — How accounting policy choices affect tax liabilities (2025-10-22)
- [Franchising in Uzbekistan: Legal Framework & Entry Structures](https://www.advizenco.com/insights/franchising-uzbekistan) — Franchise law, registration, royalties and IP protection (2025-09-15)
- [Payroll & Social Contributions: Employer Obligations in Uzbekistan](https://www.advizenco.com/insights/payroll-social-contributions) — PIT, social tax, INPS, payroll mechanics and deadlines (2025-08-30)
- [Escrow Accounts in Uzbekistan: Legal Mechanics & Use Cases](https://www.advizenco.com/insights/escrow-accounts-uzbekistan) — How escrow works under Uzbekistan law, use in M&A and real estate (2025-07-18)
- [Creative Industry Park: Uzbekistan's Framework for Creative Economy](https://www.advizenco.com/insights/creative-industry-park-uzbekistan) — Tax incentives, residency requirements, eligible activities (2025-06-05)
- [Online Gambling Regulation in Uzbekistan](https://www.advizenco.com/insights/online-gambling-uzbekistan) — Licensing requirements, prohibited activities, operator obligations (2025-05-20)
- [Permanent Establishment Risk in Uzbekistan](https://www.advizenco.com/insights/permanent-establishment-uzbekistan) — When a foreign company creates taxable presence and how to mitigate it (2025-04-14)
- [Self-Employment Regime in Uzbekistan](https://www.advizenco.com/insights/self-employment-uzbekistan) — Self-employed status, tax rates, registration and limitations (2025-03-08)
- [Crypto-Asset Service Providers: Licensing in Uzbekistan](https://www.advizenco.com/insights/crypto-asset-service-providers-uzbekistan) — NAPP licensing, permitted activities, AML obligations (2025-02-19)
- [Licensing Procedures for Regulated Activities in Uzbekistan](https://www.advizenco.com/insights/licensing-procedures-uzbekistan) — Law No. ЗРУ-701: licensing, permitting and notification tracks (2024-12-10)
- [Accounting Law in Uzbekistan: Key Requirements for Businesses](https://www.advizenco.com/insights/accounting-law-uzbekistan) — Who must keep accounts, reporting obligations, penalties (2024-10-30)
- [Representative Offices in Uzbekistan: Registration & Compliance](https://www.advizenco.com/insights/representative-offices-uzbekistan) — MIVT accreditation, documents, timelines and ongoing obligations (2024-09-12)
- [Voluntary Liquidation of Companies in Uzbekistan](https://www.advizenco.com/insights/voluntary-liquidation-uzbekistan) — 13-step procedure, creditor priority, 2019 reform simplifications (2024-08-06)
- [PIT Refunds for Education Expenses in Uzbekistan](https://www.advizenco.com/insights/pit-refunds-education-uzbekistan) — How to claim personal income tax refunds for tuition, mortgage, INPS (2024-07-22)

## Audience

- Foreign investors and multinationals entering Uzbekistan
- Companies from Europe, the Gulf, Asia, and the CIS
- Local Uzbek businesses seeking professional advisory services
- Entrepreneurs registering a company in Uzbekistan
- Companies requiring EOR / payroll outsourcing in Central Asia
- Fintech and crypto businesses seeking NAPP licensing guidance
